source: AortaSeg24 challenge proceedings (Imran et al., Table 2 of arXiv:2502.05330) — 13 anatomic branches + 10 aortic zones
notes: Class names match the names listed in Table 2 of the AortaSeg24 challenge paper. The 1-based ID assignment (branches 1-13, zones 14-23) is INFERRED — the paper does not explicitly enumerate integer IDs. Before any Phase B backend goes live, the IDs MUST be re-verified against the actual ground-truth NIfTI label values from the AortaSeg24 dataset. The Zone-N → pipeline_label mapping below is also provisional and depends on the official zone-to-anatomy correspondence (likely Ishimaru-like aortic zoning, but not confirmed). Aortic wall and intraluminal thrombus are NOT in this dataset — AortaSeg24 segments lumen + branches only.

classes.name: left_external_iliac
classes.comment: merged with CIA for the pipeline; extend_to_cfa downstream

classes.name: right_external_iliac
classes.comment: merged with CIA for the pipeline; extend_to_cfa downstream

classes.name: left_internal_iliac
classes.comment: not in current pipeline scheme; could become label 12 if added

classes.name: right_internal_iliac
classes.comment: not in current pipeline scheme; could become label 13 if added

classes.name: aortic_zone_0
classes.comment: provisional thoracic zone, out of EVAR scope; verify against challenge zone diagram

classes.name: aortic_zone_9
classes.comment: provisional distal aorta to bifurcation; verify
